description: Valid independent signature, but over a different canonical envelope hash than the proposed action. The verdict approved a different call than the one in the chain.

trust_policy.policy: An admission verdict counts as independent iff its signing pubkey is in independent_verifier_pubkeys AND is not the actor/executor pubkey in the chain.
